# Best Free AI Tools for Startup Founders in 2026

Startups have limited budgets but unlimited ambitions. Free AI tools level the playing field!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more free tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] Free: Marketing on a Budget

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]'s free plan is perfect for early-stage startups needing content.

### Rytr Free for Startups
- **10,000 characters/month**: Enough for initial marketing
- **50+ templates**: For every content need
- **Brand voice**: Consistent messaging

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## ChatGPT Free: Your AI Co-Founder

ChatGPT is like having a cofounder available 24/7 to help with strategy, writing, and problem-solving.

### ChatGPT for Startups
- **Business strategy**: Brainstorm and refine ideas
- **Customer research**: Understand your market
- **Content creation**: All your writing needs

## [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]: Free for Students & Startups

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] is free for verified students and open-source maintainers.

### Copilot for Technical Founders
- **Faster coding**: Write code 50% faster
- **Bug detection**: Catch issues early
- **Documentation**: Auto-generate code docs
